mechanics.excerpt: The battered Capellan Confederation agreed willingly to the Federated Suns terms_ desperate free its scant military resources for use against other enemies Despite Kapetyn treaty; the Free Worlds League had exploited the Confederation'$ weakened state , taking more than few Capellan worlds; hoped survive nation_ the Confederation could no longer afford war with the Davion realm; ENEMIES FROM BEYOND In that year; while hunting pirates in the Periphery near tne Free Rasalhague Republic , detachment of the famed Kell Hounds mercenary unit met and succumbed t0 mysterious fighting force on godforsaken planet known as The Rock: Casualties included Phelan Kell; oniy son the Hounds founder Morgan Kell and cousin to Victor Steiner-Davion Hanse and Melissa'$ eldest son.
